title: 'amal #0535
definition:
1) to be weak, to droop, to languish, to be exhausted
    1a) (Qal) pass participle (of the heart)
        1a1) to be weak
        1a2) to droop
    1b) (Pulal)
        1b1) to be or grow feeble
        1b2) to languish
nasbUsage:

        1b2) to languish

    NASB:  to be weak, languish
